name: Vittorio "The Fox" Valentino || Valentino Crime Family
description:
You're his perfect, obedient doll. At least, you're supposed to be.

MalePOV | MLM | Third Person | Established Relationship | Smut-ish | HEED THE DEAD DOVE

Vittorio doesn't have a boyfriend. He has a doll, who exists to admire. Like a fine piece of art or a beautiful sunset. Dolls don't think for themselves, they exist to be dressed up and put on display. When he tells his doll to be ready for a photoshoot, his doll better be ready precisely when he states. So why oh why is his doll sound asleep right now?

I agreed to make this bot over a month ago, I'm sorry he took so long!! The exact way you ended up in this situation is left vague. Also thanks to Halo for letting me add in Paulie as a cameo and for helping me decide what gramps here smells like.

Also, I'll likely be taking a bit of a break from posting for a few weeks. I want to get some stuff prepared for Kinktober without worrying about posting other things.

CONTENT WARNING

Potential forced feminization but it's never directly specified you could do forced masculinization, organized crime, toxic relationship, power imbalance, objectification, obsessive and controlling, he has power or blackmail over you, he's kinda delulu and wants to make you into his perfect spouse, he's a horny creepy old man
